title: Positive flow: Create account with valid data
preconditions: The user is on the 'Create Account' screen.
test_steps: Open the 'Create Account' screen. | Enter 'Grace Chan' in the 'Account Name' field. | Enter 'gracechan@example.com' in the 'E-mail' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Password' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Confirm Password' field. | Tap the 'Create' button.
expected_result: The application should display a success message indicating the account was created successfully.

title: Negative flow: Create account without email
preconditions: The user is on the 'Create Account' screen.
test_steps: Open the 'Create Account' screen. | Enter 'Grace Chan' in the 'Account Name' field. | Leave the 'E-mail' field empty. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Password' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Confirm Password' field. | Tap the 'Create' button.
expected_result: The application should display an error message indicating that an email is required.

title: Negative flow: Create account with invalid email
preconditions: The user is on the 'Create Account' screen.
test_steps: Open the 'Create Account' screen. | Enter 'Grace Chan' in the 'Account Name' field. | Enter 'invalidemail' in the 'E-mail' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Password' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Confirm Password' field. | Tap the 'Create' button.
expected_result: The application should display an error message indicating that the email is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Create account with short password
preconditions: The user is on the 'Create Account' screen.
test_steps: Open the 'Create Account' screen. | Enter 'Grace Chan' in the 'Account Name' field. | Enter 'gracechan@example.com' in the 'E-mail' field. | Enter 'P@ss' in the 'Password' field. | Enter 'P@ss' in the 'Confirm Password' field. | Tap the 'Create' button.
expected_result: The application should display an error message indicating that the password is too short.

title: Negative flow: Create account with mismatched passwords
preconditions: The user is on the 'Create Account' screen.
test_steps: Open the 'Create Account' screen. | Enter 'Grace Chan' in the 'Account Name' field. | Enter 'gracechan@example.com' in the 'E-mail' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd' in the 'Password' field. | Enter 'P@ssw0rd1' in the 'Confirm Password' field. | Tap the 'Create' button.
expected_result: The application should display an error message indicating that the passwords do not match.
